Package global.thalion.ttio

package global.thalion.ttio
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description

    Analysis primitives (v0.12.0+).

    global.thalion.ttio.protocols
    Domain protocols defining the five cross-cutting capabilities (CV annotation, encryption, indexability, provenance, streamability).

    Storage/transport provider abstraction — Milestone 39.

  • Class
    Description
    AcquisitionRun
    An ordered collection of spectra from one acquisition, with instrument config, spectrum index, and optional chromatograms.
    AxisDescriptor
    Describes a single axis of a SignalArray: its semantic name, unit, numeric range, and sampling mode.
    Chromatogram
    Chromatogram: time-vs-intensity trace.
    CVParam
    A single controlled-vocabulary parameter reference.
    EncodingSpec
    Describes how a SignalArray buffer is encoded on disk: numeric precision, compression algorithm, and byte order.
    Enums
    Enumerations mirroring the ObjC TTIOEnums.h integer values.
    Enums.AcquisitionMode
    High-level acquisition scheme for a run.
    Enums.ActivationMethod
    MS/MS precursor activation (dissociation) method.
    Enums.ByteOrder
    Byte order of a signal buffer on disk.
    Enums.ChromatogramType
    Chromatogram kind.
    Enums.Compression
    Compression algorithm applied to a signal buffer.
    Enums.EncryptionLevel
    Multi-level protection granularity (MPEG-G style).
    Enums.IRMode
    Infrared y-axis interpretation (transmittance vs.
    Enums.Polarity
    Ion polarity for mass spectrometry.
    Enums.Precision
    Numeric precision of a signal buffer.
    Enums.SamplingMode
    Axis sampling regularity.
    Feature
    A feature-level observation: a peak detected in one run, with retention time + m/z + charge + per-sample abundances.
    FeatureFlags
    Reader/writer for TTI-O feature flags stored as root group attributes.
    FreeInductionDecay
    NMR free-induction decay.
    Identification
    A spectrum-level chemical-entity identification.
    InstrumentConfig
    Immutable instrument configuration value class.
    IRImage
    Infrared hyperspectral imaging dataset: width × height pixel grid, each pixel an IR spectrum of spectralPoints intensity values sampled at a shared wavenumber axis.
    IRSpectrum
    1-D infrared spectrum: wavenumber + intensity arrays plus mode (absorbance vs.
    IsolationWindow
    Precursor isolation window for MS/MS scans, expressed as a target m/z with asymmetric lower/upper offsets in Th (Da).
    MassSpectrum
    A mass spectrum: m/z + intensity arrays plus MS level, polarity, scan window, and optional precursor activation / isolation metadata.
    MiniJson
    Minimal JSON parser/encoder for the compound-metadata JSON attribute fallback path (§6 of format-spec).
    MSImage
    Imaging mass spectrometry dataset with spatial grid and tile access.
    NMR2DSpectrum
    2-D NMR spectrum: row-major double[] intensity matrix of width × height points plus F1 and F2 axis descriptors.
    NMRSpectrum
    1-D NMR spectrum: chemical-shift + intensity arrays plus nucleus type and spectrometer frequency in MHz.
    NumpressCodec
    Numpress-delta codec for near-lossless compression of spectral data.
    NumpressCodec.EncodedResult
     
    ProvenanceRecord
    A single provenance step describing how data was produced or transformed.
    Quantification
    An abundance observation for a chemical entity in a sample.
    Query
    Compressed-domain query over a SpectrumIndex.
    RamanImage
    Raman hyperspectral imaging dataset: width × height pixel grid, each pixel a Raman spectrum of spectralPoints intensity values sampled at a shared wavenumber axis.
    RamanSpectrum
    1-D Raman spectrum: wavenumber + intensity arrays plus laser excitation / power / integration metadata.
    SignalArray
    The atomic unit of measured signal in TTI-O.
    SpectralDataset
    Root reader/writer for TTI-O .tio files.
    Spectrum
    Base class for any spectrum.
    SpectrumIndex
    Compressed-domain query index for spectra in an acquisition run.
    StreamReader
    Sequential reader for a single MS run inside an .tio file.
    StreamWriter
    Incrementally append mass spectra to an .tio file.
    TransitionList
    Ordered list of SRM/MRM transitions.
    TransitionList.Transition
    One SRM/MRM transition.
    TwoDimensionalCorrelationSpectrum
    2D correlation spectrum (Noda 2D-COS): synchronous + asynchronous rank-2 correlation matrices sharing a single spectral-variable axis (ν1 = ν2).
    UVVisSpectrum
    1-D UV-visible absorption spectrum: wavelength (nm) and absorbance channels plus path-length and solvent metadata.
    ValueRange
    Closed numeric range [minimum, maximum].
